title: Build a Multiplayer Text RPG
description: Build a multiplayer text RPG where players connect over the network to explore a shared world. Combines OOP design, socket networking, threading, database persistence, and command parsing into a complete game system.
final_description: A complete multiplayer text RPG with a room/map system, character classes with inheritance, item and inventory management, turn-based combat, a threaded TCP server handling multiple players, SQLite world persistence, save/load game state, and a text command parser — built across 10 chapters.
